title: All That Bex Pick Of The Fringe
description: This is your golden ticket to the absolute cream of Brighton Fringe. All That Bex teams up with UpRoar Arts to deliver a curated extravaganza of the most exceptional acts on offer. It’s a rollercoaster of laughter, talent, and sheer brilliance. Whether you’re a Fringe regular or a newbie, this is where you’ll witness the top-tier talents, the show-stopping comedy, and the moments everyone will be talking about. This is the finest Fringe pick, and if you’re not there, you’re missing the pinnacle. Come and experience pure, unadulterated Fringe excellence. This Sunday 17 May: Host: Brandy Bex Acts: Anna Soden Crudi Dench Pearl and Dean CK Nath

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
